rag_rules: Generate AGREE contracts inside annex agree blocks with assume/guarantee syntax
Use initialized temporal recurrence for stateful equations and nested if-then-else for branching logic
generic_rules: Place input assumptions and output guarantees in component type annexes when concrete bounds or visible relations are provided
Use visible identifiers from the current component scope to avoid unresolved reference errors
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE logical operators include and, or, not(...), and implication =>
Component implementation annexes are for implementation-level bindings such as assign statements
anti_patterns: Do not encode AADL timing properties as AGREE expressions unless typed ports or constants are explicitly exposed
Do not invent declarations for unresolved identifiers; use only visible identifiers from the current scope
irrelevant_topics: AADL property names as AGREE variables
